title: Building Scalable Dashboards with Vue.js and Laravel
excerpt: Dashboards are at the core of modern applications. Here’s how I build scalable and maintainable ones.
content:
Why Dashboards Matter

Dashboards centralize data and help businesses make decisions faster.

My Stack

I use Vue.js for dynamic interfaces and Laravel for structured backend logic.

Best Practices

  • Modular components
  • Reusable APIs
  • Clear data flow

Example

I applied this approach in Ilya Tour and Distrack systems.
